title: Raise exceptions only from specific classes
description: This rule checks if the user raises exceptions or BaseException or its subclasses directly.
message: Raising exceptions or BaseException or its subclasses directly is discouraged.
recommendation: Use specific exception classes instead of raising BaseException or its subclasses directly.

compliant.code: from my_module import MyCustomException; raise MyCustomException('My error')

why_is_this_an_issue: Raising specific exceptions makes it easier to handle errors in the code.
how_to_fix: Create a specific exception class and raise that instead.

metadata.title: Raise exceptions only from specific classes
